instruction: collapse all TODO list in android studio

location.label: Collapse All button in TODO tool window toolbar (box/tree-collapse icon, 4th icon from top after up/down/filter)
location.name: Collapse All button in TODO tool window toolbar (box/tree-collapse icon, 4th icon from top after up/down/filter)
location.reasoning: The TODO tool window toolbar shows a vertical column of icons. From top to bottom: up arrow (previous), down arrow (next), funnel (filter), then a box-like icon (z12) which is the standard 'Collapse All' icon in Android Studio's TODO tool window. This icon is also currently highlighted/selected (blue background), indicating it's the active/focused control. Clicking it will collapse all TODO items in the TODO list.
